title: Testing Error Handling
description: Build utilities to test error handling: verify exceptions are raised, check error messages, catalog errors across inputs, and verify handler correctness.
hints: In expect_error, catch the specific error_type first, then catch Exception for other errors
Use str(e) to get the error message and check with 'in' operator
type(e).__name__ gives you the exception class name as a string
error_catalog maps each input to either 'success' or the error type name
correctly_handled: error inputs that correctly raised exceptions
false_positive: success inputs that incorrectly raised exceptions

testCases.description: Test expect_error returns False when no error
Test error_catalog maps error inputs correctly
Test verify_handler counts correctly handled errors
Test expect_error returns False for wrong error type
